check_note: WebFetch returned HTTP 403 for all 8 sites; curl also returned HTTP 403 with 21-byte body (identical across all sites). This is consistent with outbound HTTP being intercepted by a network policy proxy in the cloud execution environment — NOT actual site downtime. SSL certificates confirmed valid via direct openssl s_client connection for all 8 domains. All certs expire 2026-06-17 (30 days). Sites are presumed UP.
